Comment.value: Note - this script does only update changes in Description, number of textfields, mediafields, content arrays an. It will NOT update Global texts, Attributes or StateToggles.

Calculation.Text: "This is what's going to be updated: ¶¶ - Block description¶ - All input labels ¶ - stateToggle states, default state, description ¶ - attribute default value, description ¶ - number of textFields, mediaFields, contentArray-fields, IO ¶ - block icon and descriptive image ¶ - all text fields HTML- and embed JSON-settings ¶¶ Global texts, attributes and stateToggles will not be affected. And naturally NO SETTINGS will be affected on exisiting page items. ¶¶ Do you want to update all blocks?"
"WARNING: Potential risk for breaking with code"

"If updated any of the following properties you also need to update the BaseProject Code - otherwise you will introduce new bugs: ¶¶ - input labels ¶ - number of textFields, mediaFields, contentArray-fields, IOs ¶ - text fields HTML- and embed JSON-settings ¶ - new or removed stateToggles or attributes ¶¶ Do you want to update all blocks?"
List template @ Block template::Number of text fields
List template @ Block template::Number of media containers
List template @ Block template::Number of value fields
List template @ Block template::Value 1 type /*BlockTemplate::CA ValueType OLD*/

"Found " & Get(foundCount) & " blocks using this template in programmes: " & $listOfLPs & "." & ¶ & ¶ & "Are you OK to update the blocks in these programmes to reflect the template? This cannot be undone."

Comment.value: Only show one block in this table
Update default value and description for all attributes in exisiting Titles

Calculation.Text: "The operation could not be performed. Perhaps records are in use by another user. Details: " & Get(lastErrorDetail) & ", " & Get(LastErrorLocation)
